meaning: vi.咕哝,嘀咕 vt.使高兴 使满意
examples: But it cost a great deal of money, so that Gruntle and Snuffle and Snuggle were not so rich after it was over.
"No, indeed," answered Gruntle. "we need all our clothes for ourselves. Tell her to go home and stop bothering us!"
"No!" answered Gruntle sternly, "we feed no beggars at our house. Tell him to go somewhere else. We need all our soup for ourselves."
